---
title: "Endangered Languages of the World"
subtitle: "INFO 526 - Summer 2026 - Final Project"
author: 
  - name: "Damon Kelson"
    affiliations:
      - name: "School of Information, University of Arizona"
description: "An exploration of the features of endangered languages"
format:
   html:
    code-tools: true
    code-overflow: wrap
    embed-resources: true
editor: visual
execute:
  warning: false
  echo: false
---

## Abstract

Linguistic analysis reveals historical and cultural details that track the geographic distribution of human populations. Endangered languages represent the potential extinction of certain subsets of human culture containing unique myths and history. This project aims to analyze the global spread of endangered languages, evaluating both their geography and numerical features of their language family, to better understand what is endangered.
